---------- Original message ----------
From: sarah.chen@contoso.com
Date: March 3, 2026
Subject: VPN not working

Hi, GlobalProtect VPN has been disconnecting every 10 minutes since Monday. I'm working remotely from home and I can't stay connected long enough to do anything. My home internet is fine — 500 Mbps, tested with speedtest. Other apps work. Laptop is Dell Latitude 5550, Windows 11. GlobalProtect version 6.1.

subject: cant access outlook
description:
Hi IT team,

I can't access Outlook since this morning. When I open it I get a red error banner that says "Cannot connect to server".

I tried:

  • Restarting the app
  • Clearing the cache
  • Checking my internet — it’s fine

Other Microsoft 365 apps work (Teams, OneDrive). Just Outlook is broken.

Thanks,
Amanda Foster
Senior Analyst | Wealth Management
Contoso Financial Services
amanda.foster@contoso.com | +1 (212) 555-0142

subject: Problema con mi computadora — no puedo entrar
description:
Hola equipo de IT,

No puedo entrar a mi computadora desde esta mañana. La pantalla dice 'Your account has been locked' y no me deja poner mi contraseña. Creo que es porque puse la contraseña mal muchas veces ayer.

Sorry, let me try in English — my account is locked. I got a message saying 'Your account has been locked out due to too many failed sign-in attempts. Please contact your administrator.' I think I typed my password wrong too many times yesterday after the password change. I'm in the Singapore office, 3rd floor. I can't do any work right now.

Mi nombre es María González, departamento de Retail Banking.
Gracias / Thank you!

subject: Server error logs
description:
We're seeing errors on the client portal. Here are the logs:

2026-03-18T06:01:12.447Z ERROR [pool-3-thread-7] c.c.api.ClientService - Failed to fetch client portfolio
java.sql.SQLTransientConnectionException: HikariPool-1 - Connection is not available, request timed out after 30000ms.
	at com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.createTimeoutException(HikariPool.java:695)
	at com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.getConnection(HikariPool.java:197)
	at com.contoso.api.ClientService.getPortfolio(ClientService.java:142)
	at com.contoso.api.ClientController.portfolio(ClientController.java:67)
2026-03-18T06:01:13.891Z ERROR [pool-3-thread-12] c.c.api.ClientService - Failed to fetch client portfolio
java.sql.SQLTransientConnectionException: HikariPool-1 - Connection is not available, request timed out after 30000ms.
	at com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.createTimeoutException(HikariPool.java:695)
	at com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.getConnection(HikariPool.java:197)
2026-03-18T06:01:15.334Z WARN  [pool-3-thread-3] c.c.db.ConnectionManager - Active connections: 50/50 (pool exhausted)
2026-03-18T06:01:17.112Z ERROR [pool-3-thread-1] c.c.api.TradeService - Trade execution failed for order ORD-89234
java.sql.SQLTransientConnectionException: HikariPool-1 - Connection is not available
	at com.contoso.api.TradeService.executeTrade(TradeService.java:89)

This is happening every few seconds. The connection pool to our primary SQL database is exhausted. Client portal and trade execution are both affected. About 200 clients are currently seeing errors.
